title: PLL Webinar
subtitle: The objective of this event was to get the students acquainted with the On-Chip Clock Multiplier (PLL) on OSU180.
description: Title of the event: PLL Webinar Objective:The objective of this event was to get the students acquainted with the On-Chip Clock Multiplier (PLL) on OSU180. BVP Optica organised an online workshop on Phased Locked Loop to get the students acquainted with the On-Chip Clock Multiplier (PLL) on OSU180. The workshop began with the introduction of ASIC design flow, PLLs and On-Chip Clock Multipliers. Theory and fundamental concepts like CMOS Implementation, Transistor Sizing, 2nd order control system,
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: BVP Optica organised an online workshop on Phased Locked Loop to get the students acquainted with the On-Chip Clock Multiplier (PLL) on OSU
